source_refs: Cat 938K/938M spec aggregation â€” RitchieSpecs, MachineryTrader dealer listings
MTM Top 50 LOCKED v1 â€” Category: Wheel Loaders, Slot 2
notes: FAMILY/SERIES: '938' spans 938K (2012â€“2018, Tier 4i/Final), 938M (2014â€“2019, T4 Final), and current Next Gen 938 (2019+). Specs vary by generation. Do not auto-fill without serial decode.
net_power_hp: 174 hp (130 kW) is the published net figure for 938K and 938M platforms per dealer aggregators. Current Next Gen 938 may differ â€” verify per serial before listing. MEDIUM confidence.
engine_model: Cat C7.1 ACERT applies to 938K/938M generations. Earlier 938G/H may use different engine. Verify generation before listing.
emissions_tier: Tier 4 Final applies to late 938K and all 938M production. Early 938K units may be Tier 4 Interim. Verify by serial range.
transmission_type: Automatic Powershift (Cat-proprietary) confirmed across 938K/M family. MEDIUM â€” verify model year.
REGISTRY ORIGIN: New record to correct incorrect slug mapping â€” '938 Series' was previously resolving to caterpillar_950k. This record must NOT inherit any 950K spec values.

PRIORITY: Pull Cat 938K OEM spec sheet (AEHQ-series) or RitchieSpecs cat-938k to lock operating_weight_lb, gross_power_hp, breakout_force_lbf, travel_speed_mph, hydraulic_flow_gpm, fuel_capacity_gal before first listing.

source_refs: Cat 336 Next Gen spec sheet â€” cat.com product page (partial reference; OEM PDF not confirmed)
MTM Top 50 LOCKED v1 â€” Category: Excavators (Crawler), Slot 3
notes: FAMILY/SERIES: '336' covers 336E (2011â€“2015, C9.3 ACERT), 336F / 336F L (2014â€“2018), 336 Next Gen (2016â€“2022, C9.3B ACERT), and 336 P-Tier (2021+). Specs differ materially by generation. Do not auto-fill without serial decode.
horsepower_gross_hp: 308 hp (230 kW) is the MEDIUM-confidence figure for the 336 Next Gen standard variant. Earlier 336E/F generations have different outputs. Verify per OEM spec sheet before lock.
horsepower_hp: Cat OEM typically publishes gross HP only for this class; net HP not separately listed. Set null until OEM PDF confirms.
engine_model: Cat C9.3B ACERT applies to Next Gen (2016+) only. Earlier 336E/F use C9.3 ACERT (without B suffix). Verify generation before populating.
engine_cylinders: 6 cylinders confirmed for C9.3B engine family. Locked.
SCOPE: Large crawler excavator, ~33â€“37 metric tonne class. Do NOT confuse with 336GC (value variant), 336D2, or 336E L (long undercarriage variant). Each may have different weight.
operating_weight_lbs: Varies significantly by generation, boom/stick configuration, and undercarriage length. Range approximately 79,000â€“90,000 lb depending on variant. Requires serial decode.
REGISTRY ORIGIN: New record â€” cat_336 was entirely absent from mtm_excavator_registry_v2.json (only 320-Series variants present). Identified gap per Top50 audit 2026-03-24.
PRIORITY: Pull Cat 336 Next Gen OEM spec sheet (AEHQ-series) to populate operating_weight_lbs, dig depth, reach, hydraulic flow, and pressure before first listing.
